dir=\"ltr\"\u003e\u003ci\u003e\u003cem class=\"italic\" style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003e\"Inventors, scientists, visionaries; these are words commonly used to describe the folks over at Lumina Complex. They were decades ahead of their time, pushing the limits of what we thought possible. We still don't truly know what happened there, or why we never heard from them again...\"\u003c/em\u003e\u003c/i\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003eExplore the ruins of this 1900's steampunk facility to uncover the cause of its downfall in this metroidvania-style adventure CTM map.\u003c/span\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cb\u003e\u003cstrong class=\"font-bold\" style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003eMap Details:\u003c/strong\u003e\u003c/b\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003eLumina Complex is a\u0026nbsp;Metroidvania-style\u0026nbsp;Minecraft CTM (Complete The Monument) map\u0026nbsp;for 1.20.2. This map contains\u0026nbsp;6 areas/objectives and\u0026nbsp;6 bonus objectives. This map is\u0026nbsp;medium difficulty\u0026nbsp;with\u0026nbsp;3-4 hours\u0026nbsp;of gameplay.\u003c/span\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cb\u003e\u003cstrong class=\"font-bold\" style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003eAdditional info:\u003c/strong\u003e\u003c/b\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003eThis map is available in the following languages:\u003c/span\u003e\u003c/p\u003e\u003cp class=\"editor-paragraph\" dir=\"ltr\"\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003eEnglish (US)\u003c/span\u003e\u003c/p\u003e\u003cp class=\"editor-paragraph\" dir=\"ltr\"\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003eSimplified Chinese (简体中文 （中国大陆))\u003c/span\u003e\u003c/p\u003e\u003cp class=\"editor-paragraph\" dir=\"ltr\"\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003eTraditional Chinese (繁體中文 （台灣）)\u003c/span\u003e\u003c/p\u003e\u003cp class=\"editor-paragraph\" dir=\"ltr\"\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003eRussian (Русский (Russkiy))\u003c/span\u003e\u003c/p\u003e\u003cp class=\"editor-paragraph\" dir=\"ltr\"\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003eJapanese (日本語 (Nihongo))\u003c/span\u003e\u003c/p\u003e\u003cp class=\"editor-paragraph\" dir=\"ltr\"\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003eFrench (Français (France))\u003c/span\u003e\u003c/p\u003e\u003cp class=\"editor-paragraph\" dir=\"ltr\"\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003eSpanish (Español (España))\u003c/span\u003e\u003c/p\u003e\u003cp class=\"editor-paragraph\" dir=\"ltr\"\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003eKorean (한국어 (대한민국))\u003c/span\u003e\u003c/p\u003e\u003cp class=\"editor-paragraph\" dir=\"ltr\"\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003eSee the readme in the map download or the map lobby for full credits and attributions (there's a lot!).\u003c/span\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003eYou may stream/record this map. Please link this page or the\u0026nbsp;\u003c/span\u003e\u003ca href=\"https://www.mediafire.com/file/6jsa2peu3o34pop/Lumina_Complex.zip/file\" rel=\"ugc nofollow noopener\" class=\"editor-link\" dir=\"ltr\"\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003edirect map download\u003c/span\u003e\u003c/a\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003e\u0026nbsp;in the video description!\u003c/span\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cb\u003e\u003cstrong class=\"font-bold\" style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003ePersonal Note:\u003c/strong\u003e\u003c/b\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003eOn Feburary 14th, I reached out to Mowse about working on my next big project, Revival. In the end, we decided to do our own short ctm map for Strawberry Jam #39, light and darkness, hosted on the\u0026nbsp;\u003c/span\u003e\u003ca href=\"https://discord.gg/ctmc\" rel=\"ugc nofollow noopener\" class=\"editor-link\" dir=\"ltr\"\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003ectmc\u003c/span\u003e\u003c/a\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003e. It was supposed to take a couple of weeks, but the project took quite a bit longer! After several months of hard work, we are proud to present Lumina Complex! It was my first time working with Mowse, and my personal best non-community project since\u0026nbsp;\u003c/span\u003e\u003ca href=\"https://www.planetminecraft.com/project/rune-quest-ctm/\" class=\"editor-link\" dir=\"ltr\"\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003eRune Quest\u003c/span\u003e\u003c/a\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003e. Alright. Enough yapping. I hope you enjoy the map!\u003c/span\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cb\u003e\u003cstrong class=\"font-bold\" style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003eMultiplayer:\u003c/strong\u003e\u003c/b\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003eThis map is multiplayer compatible (1-2 players recommended, supports up to 4) and comes with a custom resource pack that will need to be distributed to all players and installed BEFORE entering the server. Be sure your server is running vanilla 1.20.2 with command blocks enabled if you want to play with your friends!\u003c/span\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003ca href=\"https://trial.stickypiston.co/map/luminacomplex\" rel=\"ugc nofollow noopener\" class=\"editor-link\" dir=\"ltr\"\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003ePlay this map with your friends on a free server with Sticky Piston!﻿\u003c/span\u003e\u003c/a\u003e\u003ca href=\"https://trial.stickypiston.co/map/luminacomplex\" rel=\"ugc nofollow noopener\" class=\"editor-link\" dir=\"ltr\"\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003e﻿\u003c/span\u003e\u003cimg src=\"https://stickypiston.co/wp-content/uploads/luminacomplex_twitter.png\" alt=\"Lumina Complex [CTM] [Metroidvania] Minecraft Map\" width=\"inherit\" height=\"inherit\"\u003e\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/p\u003e"])</script><script>self.__next_f.push([1,"5c:Tddd,"])</script><script>self.__next_f.push([1,"\u003cp class=\"editor-paragraph\" dir=\"ltr\"\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003eThe Netherflame Blade is a puzzle/adventure/PVE map for version \u003c/span\u003e\u003cb\u003e\u003cstrong class=\"font-bold\" style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003e1.21.4 EXACTLY\u003c/strong\u003e\u003c/b\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003e that was made by me, \u003c/span\u003e\u003ca href=\"https://www.youtube.com/@psykat777\" rel=\"ugc nofollow noopener\" class=\"editor-link\" dir=\"ltr\"\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003ePsyKat777\u003c/span\u003e\u003c/a\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003e, the creator of the \u003c/span\u003e\u003ca href=\"https://www.planetminecraft.com/project/enhanced-6266962/\" class=\"editor-link\" dir=\"ltr\"\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003eEnhanced\u003c/span\u003e\u003c/a\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003e map series. It has been tested by me and 2 beta testers, \u003c/span\u003e\u003ca href=\"https://www.youtube.com/@guigui0246\" rel=\"ugc nofollow noopener\" class=\"editor-link\" dir=\"ltr\"\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003eguigui0246\u003c/span\u003e\u003c/a\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003e and \u003c/span\u003e\u003ca href=\"https://www.youtube.com/@humungousRat/videos\" rel=\"ugc nofollow noopener\" class=\"editor-link\" dir=\"ltr\"\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003esoph1703\u003c/span\u003e\u003c/a\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003e. Based on what I hear from the testers, the map’s puzzles are normal difficulty, and the combat entirely depends on your in-game difficulty. It should take about 2-3 hours to beat. While development was a bit rocky for various reasons, I finished the map over a year after I started developing it!\u003c/span\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003eIn it, you are a teenage boy in rural South Carolina, USA, and the day is March 19th, 2017. Due to your poor performance in school as of late, your parents have decided that you will be spending the day outdoors like they did when they were your age. After wandering around for a few hours, you encounter a mysterious man and quickly find yourself deep underground in a ruined laboratory. In this laboratory, more formally Facility 33 of the Arctangent Laboratories, you will uncover all sorts of secrets, from information regarding a mysterious sword called the “Netherflame Blade” to the true nature of the mysterious evil that has destroyed the facility. If you want to leave this place, you’ll have to forge the Netherflame Blade and defeat this evil.\u003c/span\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003eThis map tries its best to take what was good about the Enhanced maps while taking away the bad parts(excessive dialogue, annoyingly difficult puzzles, etc.). New aspects are also added, like voice acting. You do NOT need to have played the Enhanced maps beforehand; they take place in entirely different universes.\u003c/span\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003eThe map is inspired by quite a few different things, most notably The Legend of Zelda, \u003c/span\u003e\u003ca href=\"https://www.planetminecraft.com/project/the-kitatcho-laboratories-chapter-1-2020-reboot/\" class=\"editor-link\" dir=\"ltr\"\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003eThe Kitatcho Laboratories\u003c/span\u003e\u003c/a\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003e, and the SCP Foundation. However, it also has some smaller inspirations, like those old NicoThePro tool maps, Undertale/Deltarune, and \u003c/span\u003e\u003ca href=\"https://www.minecraftmaps.com/49646-don-t-turn-it-on-origins-realms\" rel=\"ugc nofollow noopener\" class=\"editor-link\" dir=\"ltr\"\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003eDon’t Turn It On Origins: Realms\u003c/span\u003e\u003c/a\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003e.\u003c/span\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003eSo, yeah, hope you enjoy!\u003c/span\u003e\u003c/p\u003e"])</script><script>self.__next_f.push([1,"5d:Td17,"])</script><script>self.__next_f.push([1,"\u003cp class=\"editor-paragraph\" dir=\"ltr\"\u003e\u003cb\u003e\u003cstrong class=\"font-bold\" style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003eMap Description\u003c/strong\u003e\u003c/b\u003e\u003c/p\u003e\u003cp class=\"editor-paragraph\" dir=\"ltr\"\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003eCinderveil is a sprawling molten cavern filled with 16 objectives. However, it seems there are only 8 slots available on the monument? Fortunately for you, each wool comes with a hint that will clue you in to the solution. Be careful though! If the wool doesn't belong on the monument, its hint is a LIE! Your goal is to solve the puzzle, deduce which wools belong on the monument AND which order they're meant to be placed in. dir=\"ltr\"\u003e\u003cb\u003e\u003cstrong class=\"font-bold\" style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003e[=-=-=-=-= Rock Paper Scissors Tag! =-=-=-=-=]\u003c/strong\u003e\u003c/b\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003eIn this unique take on a regular game of tag, a group of players will play the usual game of Tag in Minecraft, except when the Tagger tags a Runner, they must play Rock Paper Scissors with them, and whoever loses becomes the next tagger, or if it's the Tagger that loses, they remain the Tagger! Every two seconds that a Runner is alive and not the Tagger, they gain a point! If a Tagger defeats a Runner in RPS, they gain 20 points, and if a Runner defeats a Tagger, they gain 5 points! Do the best you can to not get tagged, because whoever has the most points at the end of the game is crowned the winner!\u003c/span\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003eThere are four different stages, and options for the game to range anywhere from one minute long to 8 minutes long. In addition, there is a secondary mode to this map called \"Hide and Seek Mode,\" where the stages expand in size to have hiding spots, and the Tagger/Seeker must find all the Runners/Hiders before the time runs out -- while also defeating them in Rock Paper Scissors!\u003c/span\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003eMap was created by Jerries (Minecraft username: Jerriess)\u0026nbsp;\u003c/span\u003e\u003ca href=\"https://www.youtube.com/@jerries9472\" rel=\"ugc nofollow noopener\" class=\"editor-link\" dir=\"ltr\"\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003e[​Youtube]\u003c/span\u003e\u003c/a\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003e\u0026nbsp;\u003c/span\u003e\u003ca href=\"https://discord.gg/PH88xbGvh9\" rel=\"ugc nofollow noopener\" class=\"editor-link\" dir=\"ltr\"\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003e[​Discord]\u003c/span\u003e\u003c/a\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003eEmail: \u003c/span\u003e\u003ca href=\"mailto:jerriesminecraft@gmail.com\" class=\"editor-link\" dir=\"ltr\"\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003ejerriesminecraft@gmail.com\u003c/span\u003e\u003c/a\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003eYoutube/Twitch gameplays are encouraged! class=\"editor-paragraph\" dir=\"ltr\"\u003e\u003cb\u003e\u003cstrong class=\"font-bold\" style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003e[=-=-=-=-= Sorry! Board Game in Minecraft! =-=-=-=-=]﻿\u003c/strong\u003e\u003c/b\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003eSorry: the game of sweet revenge! In this fully-functioning Minecraft remake of a classic game board, you must carry 4 pawns from your starting area, around a 60-space board, to your home base, while knocking back your opponents! Can you get your pawns home as quickly and safely as possible, or will you end up feeling\u0026nbsp;\u003c/span\u003e\u003ci\u003e\u003cem class=\"italic\" style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003esorry???\u003c/em\u003e\u003c/i\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003eEach round, players take turns pulling a card from the deck to either move their pawn forward, or knock opponent pawns' back! ﻿Some cards give you options with special abilities to let you build your strategy to win! But mostly, if you ever land on someone's pawn, you send that person's pawn back to their start! Land on a slide to boost your pawn forward even more! The game is suited for 2-4 players\u003c/span\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003eTry out some of the other settings too! For example, try playing in Trouble! mode! It turns the game into the board game Trouble!, which works similarly to Sorry! but uses dice and is more simplified!\u003c/span\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003eMap was created by Jerries (Minecraft username: Jerriess)\u0026nbsp;\u003c/span\u003e\u003ca href=\"https://www.youtube.com/@jerries9472\" rel=\"ugc nofollow noopener\" class=\"editor-link\" dir=\"ltr\"\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003e[​Youtube]\u003c/span\u003e\u003c/a\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003e\u0026nbsp;\u003c/span\u003e\u003ca href=\"https://discord.gg/PH88xbGvh9\" rel=\"ugc nofollow noopener\" class=\"editor-link\" dir=\"ltr\"\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003e[​Discord]\u003c/span\u003e\u003c/a\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003ci\u003e\u003cem class=\"italic\" style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003e﻿Email: \u003c/em\u003e\u003c/i\u003e\u003ca href=\"mailto:jerriesminecraft@gmail.com\" class=\"editor-link\" dir=\"ltr\"\u003e\u003ci\u003e\u003cem class=\"italic\" style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003ejerriesminecraft@gmail.com\u003c/em\u003e\u003c/i\u003e\u003c/a\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003eYoutube/Twitch gameplays are encouraged! Please give credit where credit is due and leave a download link for others to play!\u003c/span\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003eDo not redistribute!\u003c/span\u003e\u003c/p\u003e"])</script><script>self.__next_f.push([1,"69:Tddd,"])</script><script>self.__next_f.push([1,"\u003cp class=\"editor-paragraph\" dir=\"ltr\"\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003eThe Netherflame Blade is a puzzle/adventure/PVE map for version \u003c/span\u003e\u003cb\u003e\u003cstrong class=\"font-bold\" style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003e1.21.4 EXACTLY\u003c/strong\u003e\u003c/b\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003e that was made by me, \u003c/span\u003e\u003ca href=\"https://www.youtube.com/@psykat777\" rel=\"ugc nofollow noopener\" class=\"editor-link\" dir=\"ltr\"\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003ePsyKat777\u003c/span\u003e\u003c/a\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003e, the creator of the \u003c/span\u003e\u003ca href=\"https://www.planetminecraft.com/project/enhanced-6266962/\" class=\"editor-link\" dir=\"ltr\"\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003eEnhanced\u003c/span\u003e\u003c/a\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003e map series. It has been tested by me and 2 beta testers, \u003c/span\u003e\u003ca href=\"https://www.youtube.com/@guigui0246\" rel=\"ugc nofollow noopener\" class=\"editor-link\" dir=\"ltr\"\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003eguigui0246\u003c/span\u003e\u003c/a\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003e and \u003c/span\u003e\u003ca href=\"https://www.youtube.com/@humungousRat/videos\" rel=\"ugc nofollow noopener\" class=\"editor-link\" dir=\"ltr\"\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003esoph1703\u003c/span\u003e\u003c/a\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003e. Based on what I hear from the testers, the map’s puzzles are normal difficulty, and the combat entirely depends on your in-game difficulty. It should take about 2-3 hours to beat. While development was a bit rocky for various reasons, I finished the map over a year after I started developing it!\u003c/span\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003eIn it, you are a teenage boy in rural South Carolina, USA, and the day is March 19th, 2017. Due to your poor performance in school as of late, your parents have decided that you will be spending the day outdoors like they did when they were your age. After wandering around for a few hours, you encounter a mysterious man and quickly find yourself deep underground in a ruined laboratory. In this laboratory, more formally Facility 33 of the Arctangent Laboratories, you will uncover all sorts of secrets, from information regarding a mysterious sword called the “Netherflame Blade” to the true nature of the mysterious evil that has destroyed the facility. If you want to leave this place, you’ll have to forge the Netherflame Blade and defeat this evil.\u003c/span\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003eThis map tries its best to take what was good about the Enhanced maps while taking away the bad parts(excessive dialogue, annoyingly difficult puzzles, etc.). New aspects are also added, like voice acting. You do NOT need to have played the Enhanced maps beforehand; they take place in entirely different universes.\u003c/span\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003eThe map is inspired by quite a few different things, most notably The Legend of Zelda, \u003c/span\u003e\u003ca href=\"https://www.planetminecraft.com/project/the-kitatcho-laboratories-chapter-1-2020-reboot/\" class=\"editor-link\" dir=\"ltr\"\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003eThe Kitatcho Laboratories\u003c/span\u003e\u003c/a\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003e, and the SCP Foundation. However, it also has some smaller inspirations, like those old NicoThePro tool maps, Undertale/Deltarune, and \u003c/span\u003e\u003ca href=\"https://www.minecraftmaps.com/49646-don-t-turn-it-on-origins-realms\" rel=\"ugc nofollow noopener\" class=\"editor-link\" dir=\"ltr\"\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003eDon’t Turn It On Origins: Realms\u003c/span\u003e\u003c/a\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003e.\u003c/span\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003eSo, yeah, hope you enjoy!\u003c/span\u003e\u003c/p\u003e"])</script><script>self.__next_f.push([1,"6a:T897,"])</script><script>self.__next_f.push([1,"\u003cp class=\"editor-paragraph\" dir=\"ltr\"\u003e\u003cb\u003e\u003cstrong class=\"font-bold\" style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003e[=-=-=-=-= Rock Paper Scissors Tag! =-=-=-=-=]\u003c/strong\u003e\u003c/b\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003eIn this unique take on a regular game of tag, a group of players will play the usual game of Tag in Minecraft, except when the Tagger tags a Runner, they must play Rock Paper Scissors with them, and whoever loses becomes the next tagger, or if it's the Tagger that loses, they remain the Tagger! Every two seconds that a Runner is alive and not the Tagger, they gain a point! If a Tagger defeats a Runner in RPS, they gain 20 points, and if a Runner defeats a Tagger, they gain 5 points! Do the best you can to not get tagged, because whoever has the most points at the end of the game is crowned the winner!\u003c/span\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003eThere are four different stages, and options for the game to range anywhere from one minute long to 8 minutes long. In addition, there is a secondary mode to this map called \"Hide and Seek Mode,\" where the stages expand in size to have hiding spots, and the Tagger/Seeker must find all the Runners/Hiders before the time runs out -- while also defeating them in Rock Paper Scissors!\u003c/span\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003eMap was created by Jerries (Minecraft username: Jerriess)\u0026nbsp;\u003c/span\u003e\u003ca href=\"https://www.youtube.com/@jerries9472\" rel=\"ugc nofollow noopener\" class=\"editor-link\" dir=\"ltr\"\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003e[​Youtube]\u003c/span\u003e\u003c/a\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003e\u0026nbsp;\u003c/span\u003e\u003ca href=\"https://discord.gg/PH88xbGvh9\" rel=\"ugc nofollow noopener\" class=\"editor-link\" dir=\"ltr\"\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003e[​Discord]\u003c/span\u003e\u003c/a\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003eEmail: \u003c/span\u003e\u003ca href=\"mailto:jerriesminecraft@gmail.com\" class=\"editor-link\" dir=\"ltr\"\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003ejerriesminecraft@gmail.com\u003c/span\u003e\u003c/a\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003eYoutube/Twitch gameplays are encouraged! We have always strived for the best quality to give everyone a fun and memorable adventure map experience. We also hope to encourage many other map makers to create and inspire others.\u003c/span\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cb\u003e\u003cstrong class=\"font-bold\" style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003eWhat Minecraft Version will I Need?\u003c/strong\u003e\u003c/b\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003eOur map is playable in\u0026nbsp;\u003c/span\u003e\u003cb\u003e\u003cstrong class=\"font-bold\" style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003eMinecraft v1.20.4\u003c/strong\u003e\u003c/b\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003e. It is\u0026nbsp;\u003c/span\u003e\u003cb\u003e\u003cstrong class=\"font-bold\" style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003eNOT\u003c/strong\u003e\u003c/b\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003e\u0026nbsp;meant to be played in any other version, as it will cause the map not to function correctly.\u003c/span\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cb\u003e\u003cstrong class=\"font-bold\" style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003eHow long will Lily - Connections Lost take to complete from start to finish?\u003c/strong\u003e\u003c/b\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003eOur map takes\u0026nbsp;\u003c/span\u003e\u003cb\u003e\u003cstrong class=\"font-bold\" style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003e7-11 hours to complete from start to finish,\u003c/strong\u003e\u003c/b\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003e\u0026nbsp;but this can vary depending on the player's skill level.\u003c/span\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cb\u003e\u003cstrong class=\"font-bold\" style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003eCan I play Lily - Connections Lost with my friends?\u003c/strong\u003e\u003c/b\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003eYes! Our map can support up to\u0026nbsp;\u003c/span\u003e\u003cb\u003e\u003cstrong class=\"font-bold\" style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003e5+\u003c/strong\u003e\u003c/b\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003e\u0026nbsp;players simultaneously. However, the recommended cap is\u0026nbsp;\u003c/span\u003e\u003cb\u003e\u003cstrong class=\"font-bold\" style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003e4-5 players\u003c/strong\u003e\u003c/b\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003e.\u003c/span\u003e\u003c/p\u003e\u003cp class=\"editor-paragraph\" dir=\"ltr\"\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cb\u003e\u003cstrong class=\"font-bold\" style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003eThe Storyline of Lily - Connections Lost\u003c/strong\u003e\u003c/b\u003e\u003c/p\u003e\u003cp class=\"editor-paragraph\" dir=\"ltr\"\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003ci\u003e\u003cem class=\"italic\" style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003eA dark force has ravaged your realm, and he has taken something special from you. As you are suddenly thrown into the action, you learn much more at stake.\u003c/em\u003e\u003c/i\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003ci\u003e\u003cem class=\"italic\" style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003eAs you travel through the world, you discover that there is much more to it than your standard Minecraft biomes. A desert where only remnants of a past civilization exist, swimming through the depths of an underwater ocean, and even exploring beyond the depths of your world that defy all reality...\u003c/em\u003e\u003c/i\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003ci\u003e\u003cem class=\"italic\" style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003eAs you meet new allies along your journey, you band together to fight and defend your world from this dark force. Will you be able to save your realm and everything you have fought for, or will your realm fall into darkness..?\u003c/em\u003e\u003c/i\u003e\u003c/p\u003e\u003cp class=\"editor-paragraph\" dir=\"ltr\"\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cb\u003e\u003cstrong class=\"font-bold\" style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003eWhat unique features does Lily - Connections Lost have to offer?\u003c/strong\u003e\u003c/b\u003e\u003c/p\u003e\u003cp class=\"editor-paragraph\" dir=\"ltr\"\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003eOur map offers many unique features, such as\u0026nbsp;\u003c/span\u003e\u003cb\u003e\u003cstrong class=\"font-bold\" style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003ecustom mobs\u003c/strong\u003e\u003c/b\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003e,\u0026nbsp;\u003c/span\u003e\u003cb\u003e\u003cstrong class=\"font-bold\" style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003eloot\u003c/strong\u003e\u003c/b\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003e, and\u0026nbsp;\u003c/span\u003e\u003cb\u003e\u003cstrong class=\"font-bold\" style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003eweapons\u003c/strong\u003e\u003c/b\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003e. It also includes an additional\u0026nbsp;\u003c/span\u003e\u003cb\u003e\u003cstrong class=\"font-bold\" style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003emusic resource pack\u003c/strong\u003e\u003c/b\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003e\u0026nbsp;and a\u0026nbsp;\u003c/span\u003e\u003cb\u003e\u003cstrong class=\"font-bold\" style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003ecustom resource pack\u003c/strong\u003e\u003c/b\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003e\u0026nbsp;that adds new retextured weapons. Lily also features a\u0026nbsp;\u003c/span\u003e\u003cb\u003e\u003cstrong class=\"font-bold\" style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003edifficulty system\u003c/strong\u003e\u003c/b\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003e\u0026nbsp;that can be changed whenever you want to even out your play style.\u0026nbsp;\u003c/span\u003e\u003cb\u003e\u003cstrong class=\"font-bold\" style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003eThe Shop\u003c/strong\u003e\u003c/b\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003e\u0026nbsp;is also another feature that will help you defeat the force of evil. You can buy new weapons, armor, and potions or upgrade your base stats with\u0026nbsp;\u003c/span\u003e\u003cb\u003e\u003cstrong class=\"font-bold\" style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003eXP Levels\u003c/strong\u003e\u003c/b\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003e! Featuring\u0026nbsp;\u003c/span\u003e\u003cb\u003e\u003cstrong class=\"font-bold\" style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003e14\u003c/strong\u003e\u003c/b\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003e\u0026nbsp;playable missions and\u0026nbsp;\u003c/span\u003e\u003cb\u003e\u003cstrong class=\"font-bold\" style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003e11+\u003c/strong\u003e\u003c/b\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003e\u0026nbsp;different and unique boss fights, you better come prepared and ready for the challenges ahead! There are also\u0026nbsp;\u003c/span\u003e\u003cb\u003e\u003cstrong class=\"font-bold\" style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003eparkour challenges\u003c/strong\u003e\u003c/b\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003e,\u0026nbsp;\u003c/span\u003e\u003cb\u003e\u003cstrong class=\"font-bold\" style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003epuzzles\u003c/strong\u003e\u003c/b\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003e,\u0026nbsp;\u003c/span\u003e\u003cb\u003e\u003cstrong class=\"font-bold\" style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003emazes\u003c/strong\u003e\u003c/b\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003e, and so much more!\u003c/span\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cb\u003e\u003cstrong class=\"font-bold\" style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003eCustom Loot and Weapons\u003c/strong\u003e\u003c/b\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003eThroughout the map, you will obtain different kinds of custom weapons. If you're lucky enough, you might stumble upon a weapon with its custom ability! There are over 30+ new weapon textures for you to discover!\u003c/span\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cimg src=\"https://i.imgur.com/85l08RD.png\" alt=\"Lily - Connections Lost [1.20.4 RPG-Style Adventure Map] Minecraft Map\" width=\"inherit\" height=\"inherit\"\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003eThe\u0026nbsp;\u003c/span\u003e\u003cb\u003e\u003cstrong class=\"font-bold\" style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003eSand Sword\u003c/strong\u003e\u003c/b\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003e\u0026nbsp;is one of the many custom weapons you will encounter while playing through this map!\u003c/span\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cb\u003e\u003cstrong class=\"font-bold\" style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003eCustom Mobs\u003c/strong\u003e\u003c/b\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003eYou will have to fight many monsters throughout your adventurous journey. These are not just your average classic zombie or skeleton. They have armor, weapons, and a means to kill anything in sight, so you better be ready to fight these mobs because they can take a punch and give one back!\u003c/span\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cimg src=\"https://i.imgur.com/muCZooH.png\" alt=\"Lily - Connections Lost [1.20.4 RPG-Style Adventure Map] Minecraft Map\" width=\"inherit\" height=\"inherit\"\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003eThe bloodthirsty\u0026nbsp;\u003c/span\u003e\u003cb\u003e\u003cstrong class=\"font-bold\" style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003eVine Warrior\u003c/strong\u003e\u003c/b\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003e\u0026nbsp;is one of the many mobs that you will find along your journey. dir=\"ltr\"\u003e\u003cb\u003e\u003cstrong class=\"editor-text-bold\" style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003e特别提醒：本地图仅限1.20.4游玩，不可在1.20.5、1.20.6、1.21或以上版本游玩！！！\u003c/strong\u003e\u003c/b\u003e\u003c/p\u003e\u003cp class=\"editor-paragraph\" dir=\"ltr\"\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cb\u003e\u003cstrong class=\"editor-text-bold\" style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003e什么是 Lily - Connections Lost？\u003c/strong\u003e\u003c/b\u003e\u003c/p\u003e\u003cp class=\"editor-paragraph\" dir=\"ltr\"\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cb\u003e\u003cstrong class=\"editor-text-bold\" style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003eLily - Connections Lost\u003c/strong\u003e\u003c/b\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003e\u0026nbsp;是一张用于 1.20.4 版本的\u0026nbsp;\u003c/span\u003e\u003cb\u003e\u003cstrong class=\"editor-text-bold\" style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003eRPG 风格冒险地图\u003c/strong\u003e\u003c/b\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003e，由 saladbowls 与 Hithcrew 制作。\u003c/span\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003e我与 Hithcrew 在这张地图上投入大量心血，只为创造一个独一无二而又令人难忘的旅程。我们尽力以最高标准，争取让玩家们玩到一张有趣且值得回忆的冒险地图；同时，我们希望这张地图能够启发其他地图作者去制作地图，继续启发他人。\u003c/span\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cb\u003e\u003cstrong class=\"editor-text-bold\" style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003e这张地图需要什么游戏版本？\u003c/strong\u003e\u003c/b\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003e本地图需在\u0026nbsp;\u003c/span\u003e\u003cb\u003e\u003cstrong class=\"editor-text-bold\" style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003eMinecraft 1.20.4 \u003c/strong\u003e\u003c/b\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003e版本游玩。在其他版本上游玩会直接导致\u003c/span\u003e\u003cb\u003e\u003cstrong class=\"editor-text-bold\" style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003e该地图彻底无法游玩\u003c/strong\u003e\u003c/b\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003e。\u003c/span\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cb\u003e\u003cstrong class=\"editor-text-bold\" style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003eLily - Connections 需要多长时间通关？\u003c/strong\u003e\u003c/b\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003e本地图大约需要\u0026nbsp;\u003c/span\u003e\u003cb\u003e\u003cstrong class=\"editor-text-bold\" style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003e7 至 11 小时通关\u003c/strong\u003e\u003c/b\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003e，但具体通关时间由于每个玩家能力水平可能会有一定差异。\u003c/span\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cb\u003e\u003cstrong class=\"editor-text-bold\" style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003eLily - Connections 支持联机游玩吗？\u003c/strong\u003e\u003c/b\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003e支持！本地图最多可\u003c/span\u003e\u003cb\u003e\u003cstrong class=\"editor-text-bold\" style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003e超过五名玩家\u003c/strong\u003e\u003c/b\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003e同时游玩。但，我们建议原则上不超过 \u003c/span\u003e\u003cb\u003e\u003cstrong class=\"editor-text-bold\" style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003e4 到 5 名玩家\u003c/strong\u003e\u003c/b\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003e。\u003c/span\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003c/p\u003e\u003cp class=\"editor-paragraph\" dir=\"ltr\"\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cb\u003e\u003cstrong class=\"editor-text-bold\" style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003eLily - Connections Lost 的剧情简介\u003c/strong\u003e\u003c/b\u003e\u003c/p\u003e\u003cp class=\"editor-paragraph\" dir=\"ltr\"\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003ci\u003e\u003cem class=\"editor-text-italic\" style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003e黑暗势力入侵了你的领域，并从你身边取走了被你视为一个特殊的存在；而当你突然被拉入这场战斗，你才了解到，原来情况远比你想象的要严重。\u003c/em\u003e\u003c/i\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003ci\u003e\u003cem class=\"editor-text-italic\" style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003e在这场跨越全世界的冒险中，你将探索超越 Minecraft 本体生物群系的各种地方：充满逝去文明遗迹的沙漠、游过海底极深处，以及世界最深处、超越一切现实之地...\u003c/em\u003e\u003c/i\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003ci\u003e\u003cem class=\"editor-text-italic\" style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003e你与旅途中结识的新伙伴一同展开这场从黑暗势力手中拯救世界的冒险。这个世界是会被拯救，还是这个世界会永远陷入黑暗？\u003c/em\u003e\u003c/i\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cb\u003e\u003cstrong class=\"editor-text-bold\" style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003eLily - Connections 有什么特殊的内容吗？\u003c/strong\u003e\u003c/b\u003e\u003c/p\u003e\u003cp class=\"editor-paragraph\" dir=\"ltr\"\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003e本地图含有大量独特内容，如\u003c/span\u003e\u003cb\u003e\u003cstrong class=\"editor-text-bold\" style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003e自定义的怪物、战利品\u003c/strong\u003e\u003c/b\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003e和\u003c/span\u003e\u003cb\u003e\u003cstrong class=\"editor-text-bold\" style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003e武器\u003c/strong\u003e\u003c/b\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003e。同时，本地图不仅包含自定义物品纹理的内置资源包，还可以配合搭载\u003c/span\u003e\u003cb\u003e\u003cstrong class=\"editor-text-bold\" style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003e专用音乐资源包\u003c/strong\u003e\u003c/b\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003e；除此以外，本地图还内建\u003c/span\u003e\u003cb\u003e\u003cstrong class=\"editor-text-bold\" style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003e难度系统\u003c/strong\u003e\u003c/b\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003e，可在游戏途中根据个人需要随时更改；地图内置的\u003c/span\u003e\u003cb\u003e\u003cstrong class=\"editor-text-bold\" style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003e商店\u003c/strong\u003e\u003c/b\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003e内可用\u003c/span\u003e\u003cb\u003e\u003cstrong class=\"editor-text-bold\" style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003e经验等级\u003c/strong\u003e\u003c/b\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003e购买武器、盔甲和药水，并且还可以增加你的各种基础数值。地图内含\u003c/span\u003e\u003cb\u003e\u003cstrong class=\"editor-text-bold\" style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003e14\u003c/strong\u003e\u003c/b\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003e个可玩任务和至少\u003c/span\u003e\u003cb\u003e\u003cstrong class=\"editor-text-bold\" style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003e11\u003c/strong\u003e\u003c/b\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003e个独一无二的 BOSS 战，且还有包括\u003c/span\u003e\u003cb\u003e\u003cstrong class=\"editor-text-bold\" style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003e跑酷、解谜、迷宫\u003c/strong\u003e\u003c/b\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003e以及更多内容！ \u003c/span\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cb\u003e\u003cstrong class=\"editor-text-bold\" style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003e自定义战利品和武器\u003c/strong\u003e\u003c/b\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003e本地图全程均可获得自定义武器，且游玩途中有几率获得带有特殊技能的武器；此外，本地图还有至少 30 个自定义武器纹理。\u003c/span\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cimg src=\"https://i.imgur.com/85l08RD.png\" alt=\"Lily - Connections Lost [1.20.4 RPG-Style Adventure Map] Minecraft Map\" width=\"inherit\" height=\"inherit\"\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003e上图中的\u003c/span\u003e\u003cb\u003e\u003cstrong class=\"editor-text-bold\" style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003e沙剑\u003c/strong\u003e\u003c/b\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003e是地图中可获得的自定义武器的其中一个。\u003c/span\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cb\u003e\u003cstrong class=\"editor-text-bold\" style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003e自定义怪物\u003c/strong\u003e\u003c/b\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003e本地图全程包含大量各式各样的怪物，且这些怪物可不只是普通的僵尸、骷髅；这些怪物装备着盔甲和武器，而且不是那么好惹的。所以，最好准备好面对它们吧！\u003c/span\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cimg src=\"https://i.imgur.com/muCZooH.png\" alt=\"Lily - Connections Lost [1.20.4 RPG-Style Adventure Map] Minecraft Map\" width=\"inherit\" height=\"inherit\"\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: class=\"editor-paragraph\" dir=\"ltr\"\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003eThis datapack is currently available for 1.20.2-1.21.10. Older versions may contain bugs and fewer features, so please read the github wiki for documentation relevant to each version.\u003c/span\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cb\u003e\u003cstrong class=\"font-bold\" style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003eHow To Use\u003c/strong\u003e\u003c/b\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003e:\u003c/span\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003eLook at a spawner with a spawner in your hand to open its settings \u0026amp; info. Right or left click to modify values, shift right or left click to scroll through the menu.\u003c/span\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003eHolding down shift allows placing spawners without pulling up the tweaking menu. Looking at a new spawner while tweaking for a full second will switch the selection. Selecting another spawner while holding sift will allow you to select mutltiple spawners to edit at once.\u003c/span\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cb\u003e\u003cstrong class=\"font-bold\" style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003eBulk Editing\u003c/strong\u003e\u003c/b\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003e:\u003c/span\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003eAny spawner you interact with will be registered in storage and assigned an id. Spawner ids are linked to their spawnpotentials, so multiple spawners can share the same id.\u0026nbsp;You can prime all registered spawners using:\u003c/span\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003ccode spellcheck=\"false\" style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003e\u003cspan class=\"font-mono\"\u003e/trigger prime_spawners set \u0026lt;ticks\u0026gt;\u003c/span\u003e\u003c/code\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003eThis works accross dimensions.\u003c/span\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003eIf you want to bulk edit spawners of a specific id, modify that spawner in your world (by placing a new one in the same spot, or by using /data modify), then select it with spawner tweaker. You will be prompted on how you would like to bulk edit spawners that share the same id. Please make sure to place modified spawners on the same block, or else it will be registered as a new id.\u003c/span\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003eAlternatively, drop your spawner while tweaking the spawner you wish to modify. This will always force the menu open, along with providing options to highlight spawners and transform spawners into the held spawner's id.\u003c/span\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003e*Bulk-editing spawners with multiple SpawnPotentials will always choose a random SpawnPotential for each spawner's SpawnData, ignoring weights\u003c/span\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cb\u003e\u003cstrong class=\"font-bold\" style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003eOptions \u0026amp; Additional Functions:\u003c/strong\u003e\u003c/b\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003eSpawner Tweaker has over 30 additional functions and options, from the ability to easily prime and highlight spawners to the ability to customize how your tweaking looks visually. All additional options and functions are available along with documentation through the in-game menu, accessible by typing:\u003c/span\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003ccode spellcheck=\"false\" style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003e\u003cspan class=\"font-mono\"\u003e/trigger spawner_tweaker_menu\u003c/span\u003e\u003c/code\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003eFor versions older than 1.21.5, please view the wiki on the github.\u003c/span\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003ci\u003e\u003cem class=\"italic\" style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003eAdditional features will be added upon request\u003c/em\u003e\u003c/i\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cb\u003e\u003cstrong class=\"font-bold\" style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003eSpawner and Chest Randomizer:\u003c/strong\u003e\u003c/b\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003eALWAYS MAKE BACKUPS WHEN USING RANDOMIZERS\u003c/span\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003eSpawner Tweaker comes with randomizer capabilities. Randomized spawners have their potentials and SpawnData randomized, but not other aspects such as player range, delay, and count. Container (chest) randomization swaps the contents or loot tables of all registered containers. Containers register into the system just as spawners do--either passively while looking around or by running volume checks.\u003c/span\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003eBefore using the randomizer, make sure you first:\u003c/span\u003e\u003c/p\u003e\u003cul class=\"editor-list-ul\"\u003e\u003cli value=\"1\" class=\"editor-listitem\" dir=\"ltr\"\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003eRemove problematic spawners (such as anti-cheese or potion) with\u003c/span\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003ccode spellcheck=\"false\" style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003e\u003cspan class=\"font-mono\"\u003e/trigger delete_spawner_id set \u0026lt;id\u0026gt;\u003c/span\u003e\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\u003cli value=\"2\" class=\"editor-listitem\" dir=\"ltr\"\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003eYou can see all the spawners in the map with\u003c/span\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003ccode spellcheck=\"false\" style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003e\u003cspan class=\"font-mono\"\u003e/trigger give_all_spawners\u003c/span\u003e\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\u003cli value=\"3\" class=\"editor-listitem\" dir=\"ltr\"\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003eRemove problematic chests (such as dev chests and fleecy boxes) with\u003c/span\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003ccode spellcheck=\"false\" style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003e\u003cspan class=\"font-mono\"\u003e/trigger delete_nearby_chests set \u0026lt;range\u0026gt;\u003c/span\u003e\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\u003c/ul\u003e\u003cp class=\"editor-paragraph\" dir=\"ltr\"\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003eYou may now run the chest and spawner randomizer functions.\u003c/span\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003ccode spellcheck=\"false\" style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003e\u003cspan class=\"font-mono\"\u003e/scoreboard players set $randomizer_seed spawner_tweaker x\u003c/span\u003e\u003c/code\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003eSets the seed for the randomizer. If unassigned, a random seed will be chosen.\u003c/span\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003ccode spellcheck=\"false\" style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003e\u003cspan class=\"font-mono\"\u003e/function spawner_tweaker:randomizer/randomize_equally\u003c/span\u003e\u003c/code\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003eEach spawner will choose a random id with equal probability.\u003c/span\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003ccode spellcheck=\"false\" style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003e\u003cspan class=\"font-mono\"\u003e/function spawner_tweaker:randomizer/randomize_weighted\u003c/span\u003e\u003c/code\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003eSpawners in the map will be randomized, but keep their id distribution (so if your original map has 5 skeleton and 10 zombie spawners, the randomizer will have 5 sekeleton and 10 zombie spawners total).\u003c/span\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003ccode spellcheck=\"false\" style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003e\u003cspan class=\"font-mono\"\u003e/function spawner_tweaker:chests/randomizer/randomize\u003c/span\u003e\u003c/code\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003eRandomizes all loot containers in the map (a loot container is any chest, barrel, or shulker that has items or a loot table)\u003c/span\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003ccode spellcheck=\"false\" style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003e\u003cspan class=\"font-mono\"\u003e/trigger delete_nearby_chests set \u0026lt;range\u0026gt;\u003c/span\u003e\u003c/code\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003eCubical range centered on yourself to remove chests from the chest id system. Use this to clear out chests inside of dev rooms or ones you always want to generate in the same spot.\u003c/span\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cb\u003e\u003cstrong class=\"font-bold\" style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003eKnown limitations:\u003c/strong\u003e\u003c/b\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003eRandomized containers that had loot tables will cause block updates. This is because mojang doesn't allow /data remove on block loot tables.\u003c/span\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cb\u003e\u003cstrong class=\"font-bold\" style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003eReuse and Contact\u003c/strong\u003e\u003c/b\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003eFeel free to use, modify, and distribute. This datapack is by link2012.\u003c/span\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003eLatest version at\u0026nbsp;\u003c/span\u003e\u003ca href=\"https://github.com/the-link2012/spawner_tweaker\" rel=\"ugc nofollow noopener\" class=\"editor-link\" dir=\"ltr\"\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003ehttps://github.com/the-link2012/spawner_tweaker\u003c/span\u003e\u003c/a\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003eThe pack is low impact so it is fine to :)\u003c/strong\u003e\u003c/b\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003eMINECRAFT PARTY 2 IS \u003c/span\u003e\u003cu\u003e\u003cspan class=\"editor-text-underline\" style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003eNOT\u003c/span\u003e\u003c/u\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003e COMPATIBLE WITH PAPER SERVER OR LUNAR CLIENT\u003c/span\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003ePlease let us know if you're looking for a group to play with!\u003c/span\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cb\u003e\u003cstrong class=\"editor-text-bold\" style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003ePlay Minecraft Party 2 on a Free Server with \u003c/strong\u003e\u003c/b\u003e\u003ca href=\"https://trial.stickypiston.co/map/minecraftparty2\" rel=\"ugc nofollow noopener\" class=\"editor-link\"\u003e\u003cb\u003e\u003cstrong class=\"editor-text-bold\" style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003eStickyPiston\u003c/strong\u003e\u003c/b\u003e\u003c/a\u003e\u003cb\u003e\u003cstrong class=\"editor-text-bold\" style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003e Maps\u003c/strong\u003e\u003c/b\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cimg src=\"https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/942784519939964958/1182359698675093684/MegaPartyBanner1.png?ex=65846947\u0026amp;is=6571f447\u0026amp;hm=c3a8e4777b752f253be3552413b85b3266117960aea4e3d8b9783de3352b6377\u0026amp;\" alt=\"Minecraft Party 2 Minecraft Map\" width=\"inherit\" height=\"inherit\"\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003ca href=\"https://trial.stickypiston.co/map/minecraftparty2\" rel=\"ugc nofollow noopener\" class=\"editor-link\"\u003e\u003cimg src=\"https://stickypiston.co/wp-content/uploads/minecraftparty2_banner.png\" alt=\"Minecraft Party 2 Minecraft Map\" width=\"inherit\" height=\"inherit\"\u003e\u003c/a\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003eMinecraft Party 2 is a four-player game loosely based on Mario Party. With the new addition of Mega Party mode, the game is now compatible for up to 10 players (recommended to have an even number). This game features over 86 minigames of which include:\u003c/span\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003e26 Free-For-All Minigames\u003c/span\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003e13 2v2s\u003c/span\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003e13 1v3s\u003c/span\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003e8 Battle Minigames\u003c/span\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003e6 Coin Minigames\u003c/span\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003e12 Duel Minigames\u003c/span\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003e9 Micro Duel Minigames\u003c/span\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003eMinecraft Party 2 also includes over 30+ different usable items and 10 unique boards to play on.\u003c/span\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003eEstimated Standard Gameplay Time: 2 hours (but can vary depending on settings chosen).\u003c/span\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003eNumber of Players: 4-10 (even number recommended but not required) (spectators allowed)\u003c/span\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cb\u003e\u003cstrong class=\"editor-text-bold\" style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003eBasic Gameplay\u003c/strong\u003e\u003c/b\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003eThe main objective for players is to earn the greatest number of stars at the end of the game. Players who are tied in Stars will have their placements determined by Coins. Stars can be bought using coins whenever the player passes the star seller. With each star purchase, the star seller moves to another random location on the board. From each player’s turn, they have the opportunity to move and earn coins. Players can take their turn by rolling (dropping) the dice and move that corresponding number of spaces. The dice rolls a random number 1-10. Each spot has a different effect on the game. Such spots can include receiving 3 coins, losing 3 coins, triggering a random coin event, triggering a duel, triggering a battle minigame, random fortunate event, random unfortunate event, a board/spot specific event, receiving a movement or trap item, or activating chance time. Coins can be used to buy stars or items from a shop. You can buy an item by walking past it and selecting the item you want to buy. Items can only be used prior to a roll. These items can be used to help you obtain stars or stop others from obtaining them. In addition to buying a star from the board, players can earn bonus stars by winning the most minigames, triggering the most events, moving the most spaces, or holding the most coins at one time. After all four players have taken their turn, a random minigame will occur allowing each player to earn coins by placing in the minigame.\u003c/span\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003c/p\u003e\u003cp class=\"editor-paragraph\" dir=\"ltr\"\u003e\u003cb\u003e\u003cstrong class=\"editor-text-bold\" style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003eGamemodes\u003c/strong\u003e\u003c/b\u003e\u003c/p\u003e\u003cp class=\"editor-paragraph\" dir=\"ltr\"\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003eCurrently, there are four gamemodes that players can play in.\u003c/span\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cb\u003e\u003cstrong class=\"editor-text-bold\" style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003eQuick Play Mode\u003c/strong\u003e\u003c/b\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003eThis gamemode allows for players to freely play any of the minigames. No scores are kept in this gamemode, and it can be ended at any time by starting a game in another gamemode. For duels and team-based minigames, players have the option to set the teams and players up as they wish or randomize the roles.\u003c/span\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cb\u003e\u003cstrong class=\"editor-text-bold\" style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003eTurn Mode\u003c/strong\u003e\u003c/b\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003eThis gamemode is strictly a specific number of turns (depending on settings). Bonus stars get awarded at the end of the last turn. Multiple players can tie for any of the bonus stars. Both bonus stars and board stars are included when determining placement. A special event occurs at the beginning of the last five turns.\u003c/span\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cb\u003e\u003cstrong class=\"editor-text-bold\" style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003eStar Race Mode\u003c/strong\u003e\u003c/b\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003eThe first player to obtain a specific number of stars (depending on settings) wins the game and the placements are determined at that point. This gamemode includes live updated bonus stars. No two players can hold the same bonus star at the same time. Players can earn bonus stars as the game goes on and lose them to other players as well. Bonus stars and board stars are both included when determining placement. A special event occurs after a minigame once the first player obtains one less star than the number required to win.\u003c/span\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cb\u003e\u003cstrong class=\"editor-text-bold\" style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003eGrand Prix Mode\u003c/strong\u003e\u003c/b\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003eThis gamemode is back-to-back minigames. You win coins for placing in minigames based on the default coin distribution. The minigames played include a diverse selection of minigame types. The minigames come in cycles of 5 in this order: 4 For all, 2v2, 1v3, Duel, and then finally a modified Free for all minigame. Duel minigames have a 60% chance for a regular duel and a 40% chance for a Micro duel (best of three). Modified Free for all minigames change the coin distribution and allow for coin minigames and battle minigames to be played. The teams are set up so that each setup for 1v3s, 2v2s, and duels will occur at least once with 4 players. For 6, 8, and 10 players, the team assignments may be random or go through a cycle. There are no stars nor board play in this gamemode. Earn the most coins to win!\u003c/span\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cb\u003e\u003cstrong class=\"editor-text-bold\" style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003eDoubles Mode\u003c/strong\u003e\u003c/b\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003eThis gamemode will allow four players to compete in two teams of two. Coins and stars are shared amongst teammates. 1v3 minigames are disabled and 2v2 minigames always occur with the same team combination. This gamemode can be played in either Star Race mode or Turn Mode.\u003c/span\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cb\u003e\u003cstrong class=\"editor-text-bold\" style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003eMega Party\u003c/strong\u003e\u003c/b\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003eThis gamemode allows up to 10 players to play at once! Can be played in either Turn Mode or Star Race Mode. Can be played as two large teams or in solo mode or in pairs (with exactly 8 players). Coin distribution is reweighted. 2v2 Minigames become two teams against each other. Certain 1v3 Minigames become 2v6s if played with 8 players. This gamemode is recommended for an even number of players, but not required.\u003c/span\u003e\u003c/p\u003e\u003cp class=\"editor-paragraph\" dir=\"ltr\"\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003c/p\u003e\u003cp class=\"editor-paragraph\" dir=\"ltr\"\u003e\u003cb\u003e\u003cstrong class=\"editor-text-bold\" style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003eBoards\u003c/strong\u003e\u003c/b\u003e\u003c/p\u003e\u003cp class=\"editor-paragraph\" dir=\"ltr\"\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003c/p\u003e\u003cp class=\"editor-paragraph\" dir=\"ltr\"\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003c/p\u003e\u003cp class=\"editor-paragraph\" dir=\"ltr\"\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003eCenter Park\u003c/span\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003eCenter park is a board that takes place in a city surrounding an urban park. In this city, players travel on the right side of the road. When entering an intersection, there are always two exits available. Right away, the East and West exits at every intersection are open. When a player lands on a magenta spot these exits close and the North and South exits open. The exit states swap every time a player lands on a magenta spot or uses a traffic whistle. This board includes two star sellers because of the high number of spaces. The custom bonus star is the “Ticket Star”. You can buy tickets from the Ticket Masters at the casinos on the corners of the map. At the end of the game, one random player's ticket is drawn and that player receives the Ticket Star.\u003c/span\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003eFloating Islands\u003c/span\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003eFloating Islands is a board that revolves around quests. Players can go on quests and collect items for rewards. The custom bonus star for this board goes to the first player to complete the most laps around the board. This board also includes teleporters which players can use for a fee to move around the board. Magenta spots will trigger a player spot scramble. There is lots of strategy in this board when it comes to moving around and at the same time, despite the board appearing large, it is quite traversable. Overall, this is a more advanced board that has original concepts not found in traditional Mario Party boards.\u003c/span\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003ePort Town\u003c/span\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003eA more classic-style Mario Party board that uses 2x2 spaces instead of 3x3. The general movement is in a clockwise square. There are three shops on the board each with 8 item slots. This board’s main feature is Bew’s ship which is a way to steal coins from opponent’s when passed or steal a star at a cost of 40 coins. Magenta spots can teleport you to a random spot or make you take a tumble or disable the ship for two turns. The custom bonus star, the “Coin Stealer Star”, is awarded to the player that steals the most coins throughout the game. This includes stealing through Bew, coin thief, or coin snatcher. Overall, this board is more beginner friendly and similar to what you’d expect in Mario Party.\u003c/span\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003eLost City\u003c/span\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003eIn this board the star seller is static and offers up to 3 stars at a time. There is a 6 turn day and night cycle. During the day, the stars cost 20 coins. During the night, the star cost can vary from 5, 10, 20, 30, or 40 coins. You can also receive free items by passing certain spaces. The board is designed such that item spaces and board events are mostly on the outside whereas the star seller is in the middle. This board also has three passable board events: Rick's key shop, guardian boss fight, and Hardini's star duplication trick. Magenta spots open or close paths. The custom bonus star goes to the player who used the most items. Overall, this board is meant to be better for shorter games compared to other boards as players can earn lots of stars in a short amount of time. However, this board can be exciting in long games too!\u003c/span\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003eCandyland\u003c/span\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003eCandyland puts players in a world full of treats where they need to make it to the star seller at the end of the path. The star seller remains in one spot for the whole game. This board has two main paths that lead to the star seller at the end. One is a shorter path. The other is a longer path that includes two board events. The board events include memorizing a path and finding a spot in a gingerbread basement. The bonus star for this board is the shopping star which is awarded to the player that spends the most coins on items. This is another typical Minecraft Party board but without the worries of losing a star because someone snipes it from you.\u003c/span\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003ePac-Maze\u003c/span\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003eThe largest board of them all! This massive board includes nearly 200 spaces and pellets scattered about. The warps on the sides of the board can be used to traverse around easier. Additionally there are power pellets that enable players to steal coins and send their opponents back to the start if passed on the board. This board includes two star sellers and a few blocked off paths that need to be opened. The custom bonus star is the Pellet Star which is awarded to the player that collects the most pellets throughout the game. Pellets do now respawn. Overall, this board has plenty of options for travel which gives opportunity for various strategies.\u003c/span\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003eZen Garden\u003c/span\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003eThis board resembles a Japanese theme with various decor around the board. The shape of the board is a small circle inside of a larger circle with paths that connect each other. At each intersection, the player must move right or left and cannot go straight. You can buy up to five stars at a time on this board, but with each additional star costing more. Because of the variable star cost, the bonus star gets awarded to whoever coughs up the most coins for stars. There is always a trade-off for buying more stars with each interaction with the star seller. This board also includes shops and free item pickups on the outside with a small inside circle that can be used to make your way around the map. In addition, this board includes a trident time trial challenge, a music disc challenge, and a mastermind challenge all of which award coins. And finally, this board includes a chaotic magenta space that can shuffle around players' coins or stars. There's a good amount of strategy on this board and always somewhere exciting to travel to.\u003c/span\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003eMooshroom Grotto\u003c/span\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003eThis board is a vast cave with some interesting secrets going on. The board is shaped with a larger outer circle with elevators around making the board more traversable. Featuring three board challenges including brewing a potion, killing spiders, and mining for ores in a dark cave, you'll always find yourself collecting coins for the altars. In the middle of this board, there are four different altars you can visit. The altars allow you to dump in coins and receive random items as a reward at a lower expected cost than the shop. You can increase your sacrificial power by collecting an enchantment shard from a brown mushroom hut and dropping it into the altar. The bonus star for this board gets awarded to whoever throws in the most coins into the altars. And finally, this board has an option to visit Bew where you can steal coins or a star from an opponent.\u003c/span\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003ePipe Canyon\u003c/span\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003eWarps! Warps! Warps! This board involves various teleporting across the map. Inspired by classic Mario Party, this board has a combination of Mario Party and Minecraft themed builds. There are three challenges where you can earn coins from including a color warp maze, defusing a cannon, and painting a canvas with boots. Around the board there are 3 pairs of warps that you can use for a fee to teleport across the map. In addition to this, there are two additional magenta warps that are used automatically when landing on the space. On to of this, Bew is included in the center of the board. The custom bonus star is awarded to whoever uses the most warps. This includes warp tolls and magenta spaces but not the warps that lead to or from Bew. Overall, in this board it's slightly easier to obtain stars compared to other boards due to the warping options and the overall layout.\u003c/span\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003eRhythmic Room\u003c/span\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003eThis music-themed board looks simple at first, but has it's share of surprises. The star price on this board starts at 20 coins and can change to 0, 5, 10, 15, 20, 30, or 40 coins and can change when a player lands on a metronome space. This board has the largest variety of magenta spaces among all of the boards. Magenta spaces do the following:\u003c/span\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003ePiano- Gives or takes 5 coins from all players\u003c/span\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003eDrum- Launches player to a random space\u003c/span\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003eChair- Launches player to a random player\u003c/span\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003eHorn- Launches player to star space\u003c/span\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003eMetronome- Changes star price\u003c/span\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003eIn addition to the crazy magenta spaces, there are two board challenges; one that tests your mashing, and another that tests your pitch. The bonus star for this board is the luck star and is awarded to whoever lands on the most yellow, black, and chance time spaces.\u003c/span\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003eSuburbia Scramble\u003c/span\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003eThis board works differently than other boards. To obtain stars, you must invest your coins into plots. If you have the most coins invested in a plot, you are the owner of that plot and can get up to 3 stars depending on how many coins are invested in that plot. The star rewards are as follows per plot:\u003c/span\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003e1-34 coins: 1 star\u003c/span\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003e35-69 coins: 2 stars\u003c/span\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003e70+ coins: 3 stars\u003c/span\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003eIn addition to this, there is a fifth plot in an area away from the main board. This plot always awards the owner 3 stars. However, this plot is rather hard to get to. You can get on the path by entering the manhole on the board. The manhole can be opened from the magenta space immediately before it or by using ghost/ghoul mode to get through. This board also features a picnic challenge and Pablo The Pincher who reinvests coins from opponents' plots into yours. Overall, the plot mechanic is different from the other boards and can be chaotic with lots of room for strategy.\u003c/span\u003e\u003c/p\u003e\u003cp class=\"editor-paragraph\" dir=\"ltr\"\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003c/p\u003e\u003cp class=\"editor-paragraph\" dir=\"ltr\"\u003e\u003cb\u003e\u003cstrong class=\"editor-text-bold\" style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003eMinigames\u003c/strong\u003e\u003c/b\u003e\u003c/p\u003e\u003cp class=\"editor-paragraph\" dir=\"ltr\"\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003eHere is a list and brief description of each minigame. (Green=Four for all, Blue=2v2, Orange=1v3, Gray=Battle minigame, Yellow=Coin Minigame, Dark Red=Duel, Red=Micro Duel)\u003c/span\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003eDropper: Fall down through randomly generated rings from the world height limit to the bottom of the world.\u003c/span\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003eMonster Shoot: Shoot monsters falling from the sky. Each monster is worth different points.\u003c/span\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003eCave Parkour: Parkour through 15 checkpoints in an abandoned cave with a randomly chosen path.\u003c/span\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003eRaft Racers: Complete two or three laps through an ice and water course on a raft. Six different paths possible.\u003c/span\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003eKnockout: Punch players out of the map with a knockback stick.\u003c/span\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003eSky Fly: Using an elytra, fly as far as you can through randomly generated rings.\u003c/span\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003eSpleef: Dig ground and shoot blocks beneath other players to get them to fall off.\u003c/span\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003eMeat Slap: Tag! Stay tagged for the least amount of total time possible.\u003c/span\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003eGladiators: All players fight to the death to be the last one standing.\u003c/span\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003eTedious tasks: Complete your 8 tasks before the other players do. You can also grief others to slow them down.\u003c/span\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003eTile Capture: Capture the most land possible by cutting players off. The tile color changes beneath you.\u003c/span\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003eRainbow Run: Agility test. Collide with moving blocks and earn more points the higher up the rainbow you collide with them.\u003c/span\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003ePlatforms: Choose one of three platforms to jump on to score points but get nothing if another player chooses the same platform as you.\u003c/span\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003eRunner: The ground disappears as you run over it. Stay in the game the longest.\u003c/span\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003eHorse Race: Race using horses. Complete checkpoints and avoid the lava and fire.\u003c/span\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003eSpeed Builders: Copy 4 randomly chosen designs the fastest.\u003c/span\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003eSteve Says: Parody of Simon Says. Do what Steve tells you to do or get eliminated.\u003c/span\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003ePower Towers (coming soon): Spam mash to build the highest possible tower in 10 seconds.\u003c/span\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003eRed Light, Green Light: Move during green light. Stop during red light or get set back to the start.\u003c/span\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003eFarming Frenzy: Harvest the most crops in a given time period and be on the lookout for seasonal crops.\u003c/span\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003ePort Priority: Scavenge for three items across the map in order.\u003c/span\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003eMatch Me Not (coming soon): Select a unique item from the other players to advance yourself.\u003c/span\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003eRocket Launch: Fly the farthest distance with an elytra and a single rocket.\u003c/span\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003eMemory Lane: Memorize a canvas of 15 blocks and place the blocks in the correct spot as the original.\u003c/span\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003ePearl Hurl: Race through an ender pearl obstacle course in The End.\u003c/span\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003eTake Flight: Elytra rocket racing.\u003c/span\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003eWhack-A-Mob: Just like whack-a-mole but with Minecraft monsters.\u003c/span\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003eOne Shot Wonder: You get one arrow that instantly kills. Rack up the most kills to win.\u003c/span\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003ePrison Pals: Complete five stages of cooperative puzzles faster than the other team.\u003c/span\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003eRock, Paper, Scissors, Chase: Choose rock, paper, or scissors against your opponents, and be prepared to chase or run.\u003c/span\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003eTanks: 2v2 brawl with one player on top as shooter and the other player on bottom in a boat with melee.\u003c/span\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003eCapture The Flag: PvP game where you must bring the opponent’s flag to your side first.\u003c/span\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003eMine Your Business: Search for your opponents in a small box of stone and kill them.\u003c/span\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003eTeam Hockey: Work with your teammate to score two goals while dealing with multiple turtles (pucks).\u003c/span\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003eMaze Navigator: You and your teammate must find an orb in the randomly generated maze and then meet together.\u003c/span\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003eBombs Away!: Throw TNT at your opponents’ island and knock them off.\u003c/span\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003eLabyrinth: Top player guides bottom player through randomly generated maze by rotating sections while bottom player must collect two pieces of gold.\u003c/span\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003eSnow Wars: A snowball fight but the snowballs hurt a bit more.\u003c/span\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cspan style=\"white-space: pre-wrap;\"\u003eSpace Jumpers: One player shoots arrows to bring out blocks on a wall for the other player to jump on.
